adapt.workspaceTree: ${(()=>{const src=Array.isArray(data)?data:[];const seen={};const list=src.filter(item=>{const k=String((item&&item.path)||'');if(!k){return false;}if(seen[k]){return false;}seen[k]=true;return true;});const fn='workspace-tree-filter-form';const keyword=((getFormValue(fn,'keyword')||workspaceFileTreeKeyword||'')+'').trim();const isDir=(item)=>item&&(item.is_dir==='1'||item.is_dir===1||item.is_dir===true);const normalizeRoot=(item)=>Object.assign({}, item, { children: undefined, isLeaf: !isDir(item), key: item.file_id||item.path||item.name, title: item.name, __lazy_loaded: false });if(!keyword){return list.map(normalizeRoot);}const roots=[];const nodeMap={};const getOrCreate=(keyPath, title, realPath, dir)=>{if(!nodeMap[keyPath]){nodeMap[keyPath]={key:keyPath,title,path:realPath,is_dir:dir?1:0,children:[],__lazy_loaded:true,isLeaf:!dir};}return nodeMap[keyPath];};const fileList=list.filter(item=>!isDir(item));for(const item of fileList){const fullPath=(item&&item.path)?String(item.path):'';if(!fullPath){continue;}const displayPath=(item&&item.path_display)?String(item.path_display):fullPath;const parts=displayPath.split('/').filter(Boolean);if(parts.length===0){continue;}let parentList=roots;let curDisplay='';for(let i=0;i<parts.length;i++){const seg=parts[i];curDisplay+='/'+seg;const last=i===parts.length-1;const node=getOrCreate(curDisplay, seg, last?fullPath:curDisplay, last?isDir(item):true);if(parentList.indexOf(node)<0){parentList.push(node);}if(last){Object.assign(node, item, { key: item.file_id||curDisplay, title: item.name||seg, path: fullPath, path_display: displayPath, __lazy_loaded:true, children: isDir(item)?(Array.isArray(node.children)?node.children:[]):undefined, isLeaf: !isDir(item) });}if(!Array.isArray(node.children)){node.children=[];}parentList=node.children;}}const prune=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}return nodes.filter(n=>{if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){n.children=prune(n.children);}const dir=(n.is_dir==='1'||n.is_dir===1||n.is_dir===true);return !dir || (Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0);});};const sortTree=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}nodes.sort((a,b)=>{const aDir=(a.is_dir==='1'||a.is_dir===1||a.is_dir===true);const bDir=(b.is_dir==='1'||b.is_dir===1||b.is_dir===true);if(aDir!==bDir){return aDir?-1:1;}return String(a.title||a.name||'').localeCompare(String(b.title||b.name||''));});nodes.forEach(n=>{if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){sortTree(n.children);}});return nodes;};return sortTree(prune(roots));})()}

adapt.workspaceRecentFileList: ${(()=>{const src=Array.isArray(data)?data:[];const isDir=(n)=>n&&(n.is_dir==='1'||n.is_dir===1||n.is_dir===true);const fmt=(n)=>{const l1=n.title||n.name||'未命名';const l2=n.sub_title||n.cn_title||n.name_zh||n.title_zh||'';return (!isDir(n)&&l2)?(l1+'('+l2+')'):l1;};const walk=(arr)=>{if(!Array.isArray(arr)){return [];}return arr.map(n=>{const children=Array.isArray(n&&n.children)?walk(n.children):undefined;const out=Object.assign({},n,{title:fmt(n),display_title:fmt(n)});if(children){out.children=children;}return out;});};return walk(src);})()}

adapt.workspaceHttpTree: ${(()=>{const src=Array.isArray(data)?data:[];const isDir=(n)=>n&&(n.is_dir==='1'||n.is_dir===1||n.is_dir===true);const fmt=(n)=>{const l1=n.title||n.name||'未命名';const l2=n.sub_title||n.cn_title||n.name_zh||n.title_zh||'';return (!isDir(n)&&l2)?(l1+'('+l2+')'):l1;};const walk=(arr)=>{if(!Array.isArray(arr)){return [];}return arr.map(n=>{const children=Array.isArray(n&&n.children)?walk(n.children):undefined;const dir=isDir(n);const rawId=String(n.id||'');const bizId=String(dir?(n.doc_group_id||(rawId.startsWith('g_')?rawId.replace(/^g_/,''):rawId)||''):(n.collect_doc_id||(rawId.startsWith('d_')?rawId.replace(/^d_/,''):rawId)||''));const key=String(n.key||rawId||(dir?('g_'+bizId):('d_'+bizId)));const out=Object.assign({},n,{key,id:bizId,type:dir?'dir':'http',title:fmt(n),display_title:fmt(n)});if(children){out.children=children;}return out;});};return walk(src);})()}

action.description: 打开文件管理表单，设置store变量

confirm.title: 确认同步
confirm.description: ${(()=>{const p=workspaceOptions.find(item=>item.project_code===workspaceCurrent)||{};return '确认同步项目【'+(p.project_name||workspaceCurrent||'')+'】目录到工作空间吗？';})()}

action.title: 当前项目缺少同步配置

adapt.workspaceTreeLazyChildren: ${(Array.isArray(data)?data:[]).map(item=>Object.assign({}, item, { children: undefined, isLeaf: !(item.is_dir==='1'||item.is_dir===1||item.is_dir===true), key: item.file_id, title: item.name, __lazy_loaded: false }))}

value.workspaceTree: ${(()=>{const setChildren=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return [];}return nodes.map(n=>{if(!n){return n;}if(n.file_id===node.file_id){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: workspaceTreeLazyChildren||[], __lazy_loaded: true });}if(Array.isArray(n.children)&&n.children.length>0){return Object.assign({}, n, { children: setChildren(n.children) });}return n;});};return setChildren(Array.isArray(workspaceTree)?workspaceTree:[]);})()}

rightMenuAction.title: 确认提示
rightMenuAction.content: ${node.is_dir?'确认删除目录【'+(node.name||node.title)+'】吗？删除后将同时删除该目录下所有子目录和文件。':'确认删除文件【'+(node.name||node.title)+'】吗？'}

data.file_id_list: ${(()=>{const list=Array.isArray(workspaceTree)?workspaceTree:[];const targetId=node&&node.file_id;const findNode=(nodes)=>{if(!Array.isArray(nodes)){return null;}for(const n of nodes){if(n&&n.file_id===targetId){return n;}const c=findNode(n&&n.children);if(c){return c;}}return null;};const collect=(n)=>{if(!n){return [];}const ids=[n.file_id];const children=Array.isArray(n.children)?n.children:[];for(const child of children){ids.push(...collect(child));}return ids;};const target=findNode(list)||node;const ids=collect(target).filter(Boolean);return ids.length>0?ids:[targetId];})()}

value.workspaceTreeSelected: ${Object.assign({}, row, { path: row.file_path, title: row.file_name, is_dir: '0' })}

rightMenuAction.title: 确认提示
rightMenuAction.content: ${row.is_dir==='1'||row.is_dir===1||row.is_dir===true ? ('确认删除分组【'+(row.title||row.display_title||row.name||'未命名')+'】吗？删除后该分组下的接口也会一并失效。') : ('确认删除接口【'+(row.title||row.display_title||row.name||'未命名')+'】吗？')}

children.title: Ctrl+S 保存 | Ctrl+D 复制行 | Ctrl+Y 删除行 | Alt+Shift+↑/↓ 移动行 | Ctrl+/ 行注释 | Ctrl+Shift+/ 块注释 | Ctrl+Alt+L 格式化 | Ctrl+F 查找 | Ctrl+R 替换 | F3/Shift+F3 查找下一个/上一个 | Ctrl+G 跳转行 | Ctrl+W/Shift+Ctrl+W 扩展/缩小选区 | Ctrl+L 选中整行

send-http-console.method: ${(async()=>{let body={};try{body=(typeof http_request_text==='string')?JSON.parse(http_request_text||'{}'):(http_request_text||{});}catch(err){store.setValue('http_response_text','请求JSON解析失败: '+(err&&err.message?err.message:String(err)));return;}const method=String((body&&body.method)||http_method||'post').toUpperCase();const requestUrlBase=String((body&&body.url)||http_url||'/template_data/data');try{const options={method,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}};let requestUrl=requestUrlBase;if(method==='GET'){const queryData=(body&&typeof body==='object')?Object.assign({}, body):{};delete queryData.method;delete queryData.url;const q=new URLSearchParams(queryData||{}).toString();if(q){requestUrl+=(requestUrl.indexOf('?')>=0?'&':'?')+q;}}else{options.body=JSON.stringify(body||{});}const resp=await fetch(requestUrl,options);const text=await resp.text();let formatted=text;try{formatted=JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(text),null,2);}catch(_e){}store.setValue('http_response_text',formatted);}catch(err){store.setValue('http_response_text','请求失败: '+(err&&err.message?err.message:String(err)));}})()}

initAction.description: 获取文件内容，这传了一个项目编码+文件路径

children.css: .workspace-http-doc{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfefc 0%,#ffffff 100%);overflow:auto;padding:8px;}.workspace-http-hero{border:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.08);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(24,226,153,0.08),rgba(24,226,153,0) 56%),#ffffff;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.03);}.workspace-http-hero-top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;flex-wrap:nowrap;}.workspace-http-hero-main{min-width:0;flex:1 1 auto;}.workspace-http-headline{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-width:0;}.workspace-http-method{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:20px;padding:0 7px;border-radius:999px;background:#d4fae8;color:#0fa76e;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.4px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;flex:0 0 auto;}.workspace-http-path{display:block;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-family:'Geist Neue',Arial,sans-serif;}.workspace-http-subtitle{display:block;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;font-size:11px;line-height:16px;color:#6b7280;}.workspace-http-title-dot{flex:0 0 auto;color:#c7ccd4;font-size:10px;line-height:16px;}.workspace-http-meta{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(70px,1fr));gap:6px;flex:0 0 216px;}.workspace-http-meta-card{border:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.08);border-radius:8px;padding:7px 8px;background:#fff;}.workspace-http-meta-label{font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;font-size:9px;line-height:12px;letter-spacing:0.3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b7280;}.workspace-http-meta-value{margin-top:3px;font-size:13px;line-height:16px;font-weight:600;color:#0d0d0d;}.workspace-http-section{margin-top:8px;border:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.08);border-radius:10px;background:#ffffff;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.06);background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fcfdfc 0%,#f6faf8 100%);}.workspace-http-section-title{font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-weight:600;color:#0d0d0d;font-family:Inter,'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif;}.workspace-http-section-caption{font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;font-size:9px;line-height:12px;letter-spacing:0.3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b7280;}.workspace-http-info-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr);gap:8px;}.workspace-http-callout{padding:10px 12px;font-size:12px;line-height:18px;color:#374151;white-space:pre-wrap;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#fbfcfc 100%);}.workspace-http-callout-muted{color:#475467;}.workspace-http-note-list{padding:6px 10px 8px 10px;display:block;}.workspace-http-note-item{font-size:11px;line-height:16px;color:#1f2937;padding:6px 0 6px 8px;border-bottom:1px dashed rgba(16,24,40,0.1);background:transparent;}.workspace-http-note-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}.workspace-http-code-panel{height:260px;padding:0;overflow:hidden;background:#0b1020;}.workspace-http-code-shell{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);background:#11182d;}.workspace-http-code-shell-title{font-size:11px;line-height:16px;font-weight:600;color:#f3f4f6;font-family:Inter,'Helvetica Neue',Arial,sans-serif;}.workspace-http-code-shell-badge{font-family:'Geist rgba(16,185,129,0.2);border-radius:999px;padding:0 6px;}.workspace-http-code-editor{height:calc(100% - 34px);}.workspace-http-table-wrap{padding:6px 8px 8px 8px;background:#ffffff;}.workspace-http-demo-wrap{padding:8px;background:#ffffff;}.workspace-http-demo-card{border:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.08);border-radius:8px;background:#ffffff;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:6px;}.workspace-http-demo-trigger{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 10px;font-size:12px;line-height:16px;font-weight:600;color:#0d0d0d;cursor:pointer;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fcfdfc 0%,#f7f9f8 100%);}.workspace-http-demo-state{font-family:'Geist Mono','SFMono-Regular',Consolas,monospace;font-size:9px;line-height:12px;letter-spacing:0.3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b7280;}.workspace-http-demo-body{padding:8px 10px;border-top:1px solid rgba(16,24,40,0.06);font-size:12px;line-height:18px;white-space:pre-wrap;color:#374151;background:#ffffff;}.workspace-http-empty{padding:12px;color:#98a2b3;font-size:11px;line-height:16px;}@media (max-width:1200px){.workspace-http-hero-top{flex-wrap:wrap;}.workspace-http-meta{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));flex-basis:100%;}.workspace-http-info-grid{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);}}@media (max-width:768px){.workspace-http-doc{padding:6px;}.workspace-http-hero{padding:8px 10px;}.workspace-http-title-row,.workspace-http-headline{display:block;}.workspace-http-title-dot{display:none;}.workspace-http-title,.workspace-http-subtitle,.workspace-http-path{white-space:normal;overflow:visible;text-overflow:clip;}.workspace-http-meta{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);}}
